calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Appointment Of Attorney-In-Fact [Probate Code Section 4541]
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christine Hoburg for Brian Brady (Petitioner).

Ms. Hoburg provided history and presented oral argument to support her position with regard to why there is no need for a conservatorship and why the Court has authority to appoint a Successor Agent under the durable power of attorney (reference made to Probate Code sections 4203 and 4266). The Petition for Appointment of Attorney-In-Fact was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
